grant_title: DEM marks Rhode Island’s 129th Arbor Day with nearly $200K in tree grants
project_area: Urban forestry and tree equity projects
demographic_requirements: Priority given to neighborhoods with the least access to tree canopy benefits (identified via American Forests’ Tree Equity Score Analyzer)
eligibility_summary: Open to Rhode Island-based cities, towns, non-profits, community groups, educational institutions, and state agencies for projects focused on urban forestry, tree equity, and community education. Specific programs include the Urban and Community Forestry Grant Program and the Tree Equity RI Grant Program.
